---
title: Distributed Computing
subtitle: "9:00 - 17:00"
date: "10 June 2026"
author: ""
language: 
  title-block-author-single: "Taught by"
  title-block-published: "Date"
categories:
  - HPC
image: ../img/icons8-workshop-96.png
image-alt: "data center"
execute: 
  cache: true
  freeze: true
---
